description: W1: SLA feasibility audit — document what per-ticket SLA targets are computable from sla_policies + ticket fields; go/no-go recorded in SCRATCHPAD
W1: sla_at_risk / sla_breached attention flags (only if F001 = go)
W1: SLA countdown on service-card ticket rows (only if F001 = go)
W2: pulse money section gains unbilled WIP: billable uninvoiced time (cents + hours) and unbilled materials for the client
W2: wip_aging attention flag when unbilled entries older than 14 days (amber, amount + oldest days)
W2: money card renders 'Unbilled work' line with hours + $ (hidden when zero)
W3: assigned tech name on each service-card ticket row (or 'unassigned' marker)
W3: ticket_unassigned attention flag (blue) counting open unassigned tickets, ref oldest
W4: pulse installBase gains warranty summary: outOfWarrantyCount + expiring90dCount from stock_units.warranty_expires_at and asset warranty fields (null when no warranty data exists at all)
W4: install base card warranty line ('N out of warranty · M expiring ≤90d'), absent when no data
W5: CSAT card collapses to compact chip unless it has at least one response
W5: client record card drops tax region + inbound domains from overview (still in Details focus)
W5: timeline suppresses invoice_created events for invoices still in draft (strip + money card already cover them); finalized history unchanged
Contract types updated for all new pulse fields; flags added to ClientAttentionFlagKind; AttentionStrip labels for new kinds
All new surfaces honest: hidden or explicit empty when no data; no zeros-as-insight
